name: Sorbet Au Cabernet
recipeInstructions:
(Makes about 1 quart.)
1. Combine sugar, wine and water in a saucepan and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Chill the mixture.
3. Crush the grapes in a processor, then squeeze through a cheesecloth to obtain 2 1/2 cups juice.
4. Add the grape and lemon juices to the syrup.
5. Process in an ice cream maker.
6. Arrange kiwi fruit and scoops of sorbet on individual dessert plates.
7. Best made within 24 hours of serving.
